speakers.name: Dr. Priya Venkatasubramanian
speakers.bio: Distributed systems researcher turned platform lead; writes the 'Quorum Notes' newsletter.

speakers.name: Marcus Oduya
speakers.bio: Former SRE who now teaches resilience engineering; collects pager stories.

speakers.name: Lena Fjordholm
speakers.bio: Compiler hobbyist and DevEx advocate; obsessed with fast feedback loops.

speakers.name: Tobias Wenningstedt
speakers.bio: Security architect with a soft spot for threat modelling workshops.

speakers.name: Aiko Tanahashi
speakers.bio: Applied ML engineer; ships small models that fit in a thermostat.

speakers.name: Rosa Belmonte
speakers.bio: Event-driven systems specialist; believes every noun is a stream.

speakers.name: Hamish McAllister-Quinn
speakers.bio: Cloud cost whisperer; reads billing dashboards for fun.

speakers.name: Yara Nakimuli
speakers.bio: Data platform engineer; turns swamps into lakehouses.

speakers.name: Felix Brandauer
speakers.bio: Agentic AI tinkerer; runs a home lab of local LLMs.

speakers.name: Sunita Raghunathan
speakers.bio: API designer; has strong, kind opinions about pagination.

speakers.name: Olalekan Adeyemi
speakers.bio: Reliability lead; coined his team's 'error budget brunch'.
